pi_items.source: Task description in task.json and verifier.py exact match requirement
Task description in task.json and exact set match requirement in verifier.py
Task description in task.json, seed_redmine.rb Tracker definitions, and exact set match requirement in verifier.py
Task description in task.json, seed_redmine.rb Role definitions, and role check in verifier.py

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a private project named 'HR Case Management' with identifier 'hr-cases'. The project must only have the 'issue_tracking' and 'documents' modules enabled, and only the 'Support' tracker enabled. Additionally, the user specified in ~/hr_manager_login.txt must be added as a member with the 'Manager' role. All of these requirements align exactly with the task description, the Redmine seed script, and the verifier script.
